title: Invesco QQQ ETF jumps toward 13-month high, as Nvidia shares soar toward best gain in 7 years
text: The Invesco QQQ Trust Series exchange-traded fund QQQ, -0.51%, which tracks the technology-heavy Nasdaq 100 NDX, -0.50%, jumped 2.3% toward a 13-month high in premarket trading Thursday, with a big rally in Nvidia Corp. shares NVDA, -0.49% providing a boost. The QQQs rally comes even as 57 of its components were traded down ahead of the open.

title: Invesco's Leisure & Entertainment ETF Lifted as Hospitality Stocks Rally
text: Hospitality companies are among the biggest gainers during the broad market rally on Wednesday. The Invesco Dynamic Leisure & Entertainment ETF (PEJ) is up over 2.1% on Wednesday, lifted by hospitality names including United Airlines Holdings Inc (UAL), up 6.1%, and Alaska Air Group Inc (ALK), up 5.7%.

text: ANNOUNCEMENT NO. 237 15 May 2023 Major shareholder announcement Major shareholder announcement - Invesco Ltd.

title: Is the Options Market Predicting a Spike in Invesco (IVZ) Stock?
text: Investors need to pay close attention to Invesco (IVZ) stock based on the movements in the options market lately.

title: 3 Investment Management Stocks to Watch Amid Industry Headwinds
text: Higher interest rates will likely aid Zacks Investment Management stocks like BlackRock (BLK), Ameriprise (AMP) and Invesco (IVZ) despite industry headwinds.

title: Invesco's (IVZ) April AUM Rises Marginally on Favorable Markets
text: Invesco (IVZ) reports a marginal rise in AUM for April on favorable market performance.

title: Invesco Ltd. Announces April 30, 2023 Assets Under Management
text: ATLANTA , May 9, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ) today reported preliminary month-end assets under management (AUM) of $1,484.3 billion, an increase of 0.1% versus previous month-end.

title: Invesco Multi-Factor ETF OMFL Sees Spike in Flows
text: The Invesco Russell 1000 Dynamic Multifactor ETF (OMFL) has seen a dramatic surge in investor interest in recent weeks. Investors have recently looked for an alternative to market cap weight strategies believing that market breadth will expand beyond a handful of mega-cap growth stocks, according to Todd Rosenbluth, head of research at VettaFi.

title: Invesco (IVZ) Forms 'Hammer Chart Pattern': Time for Bottom Fishing?
text: Invesco (IVZ) witnesses a hammer chart pattern, indicating support found by the stock after losing some value lately. This coupled with an upward trend in earnings estimate revisions could mean a trend reversal for the stock in the near term.
